summary: Tested RFQ Multi-Step Drafts & PDP Spec Prefill feature. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (1 skipped - freeze on won quote requires complex vendor quote setup). Frontend: Fixed critical bug in anonymous user flow (body stream already read error). Identified 2 frontend issues: (1) Brand users don't see logged-in card on Step 4 because profile fetch only checks customer token, (2) RFQModal on PDP doesn't receive fabric prop so 'Open full RFQ form' link doesn't appear.

ui_bugs.issue: Brand users see contact form instead of logged-in card because useEffect only checks lf_customer_token, not lf_brand_token
Modal doesn't show fabric specs preview or 'Open full RFQ form' link because fabric prop is not being passed correctly from FabricDetailPage

action_items: Fix RFQPage.js useEffect to also check lf_brand_token and fetch brand profile via /api/brand/me for Step 4 logged-in card
Debug why RFQModal doesn't receive fabric prop from FabricDetailPage - the prop is passed but modal renders as if fabric is null/undefined
critical_code_review_comments: RFQPage.js line 137-163: Profile fetch only checks lf_customer_token, should also check lf_brand_token and use /api/brand/me endpoint
RFQModal.js: The fabric prop conditional rendering (line 218) works correctly, issue is upstream in how FabricDetailPage passes the prop
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test RFQs during testing (RFQ-TB1NYQ, RFQ-RZ2G0H, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFQ draft/PATCH flow tested. Key findings: (1) Backend POST /api/rfq/submit with is_draft=true works correctly for logged-in users, (2) PATCH /api/rfq/{rfq_id} correctly updates only specified fields and mirrors aliases, (3) PATCH with finalize=true promotes draft→new with finalized_at timestamp, (4) Permission checks (403/404) work correctly, (5) PDP prefill via /rfq?fabric_id=<id> works - category, composition, GSM, width, color are pre-filled and toast shows 'Specs pre-filled from <fabric name>', (6) Anonymous users can progress locally through wizard (fixed body stream error), (7) Brand users don't see logged-in card on Step 4 (needs fix), (8) RFQModal on PDP doesn't show fabric specs or 'Open full RFQ form' link (needs investigation).

backend_draft_creation.details: POST /api/rfq/submit with is_draft=true creates RFQ with status='draft' and returns id+rfq_number

backend_patch_partial_update.details: PATCH /api/rfq/{rfq_id} updates only specified fields, keeps status='draft'

backend_patch_finalize.details: PATCH with finalize=true promotes draft→new and stamps finalized_at

backend_patch_composition.details: Composition list rejects empty rows, accepts valid {material, percentage}

backend_patch_permissions.details: Returns 403 for non-owner, 404 for unknown rfq_id

backend_freeze_on_won.details: Requires complex vendor quote setup - code review confirms logic is correct

frontend_draft_badge.details: Green 'Draft RFQ-XXXXXX saved' badge appears after Step 1 for logged-in users

frontend_step_progression.details: Steps 1→2→3→4 work correctly, each step PATCHes the draft

frontend_pdp_prefill.details: /rfq?fabric_id=<id> auto-fills category, composition, GSM, width, color, weave from fabric

frontend_anonymous_flow.details: Fixed body stream error - anonymous users can progress locally and submit at end

frontend_brand_loggedin_card.details: Brand users see contact form instead of logged-in card on Step 4

frontend_rfqmodal_detailed_link.details: RFQModal on PDP doesn't show 'Open full RFQ form' link - fabric prop not received

bugs_fixed.issue: Anonymous users got 'body stream already read' error on Step 1 Continue
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved res.json() call after res.ok check to avoid reading body twice on 400 response
